\tzpentry{ID5527}{Varepsilon Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5527 introduces Varepsilon Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \ddot q_i + 2\gamma_i\dot q_i + \omega_i^2 q_i + \varepsilon \sum_j K_{ij}\bigl(\hat{\mathbf{n}}(t)\bigr) q_j = F_i(t). \end{equation}
